subcodes.first_line: We have made thee among those who have attained unto Our grace and have entrusted unto them the service of the Sacred Places. Take what thou hast been commanded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا جعلناک من الذین فازوا بعنایتی و فوضنا الیهم خدمه البقاع خذ ما امرت به و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @personal instructions, @suffering and imprisonment, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
